description:
Generate an accessible modal using the native dialog element and minimal JavaScript wiring.
Use aria-labelledby="dialog-title" and aria-describedby="dialog-description" on <dialog>, with matching element ids and a close button labeled exactly aria-label="Close dialog". Use HTMLDialogElement API methods (showModal() and close()). Implement focus trap Tab wrapping with an event key check, event.preventDefault(), and focus handoff (for example first?.focus() or focusable[0]?.focus()). Include Escape-key close and backdrop click close logic using event.target === dialog.
